feedback.text: Hello, I think that the DFA is a very good step for consumer protection, but could also include protections against companies deactivating or revoking products that consumers have already paid for. I play video games, and at any time the video game publisher can simply deactivate the games that I have already paid for with no warning. Not only is it unfair to the consumers, but also to the artists whose work will be gone forever. I hope this topic can also be considered for inclusion into the DFA.
